name: Sloppy Joes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, cook the ground beef over medium heat until it is browned, stirring occasionally to separate the meat.
2. Spoon off any excess fat from the skillet.
3. Add the Campbell's Italian Tomato Soup, water, Worcestershire sauce, and pepper to the skillet. Stir well.
4. Heat the mixture through for a few minutes, ensuring all ingredients are evenly heated.
5. Serve the Sloppy Joes on toasted hamburger buns.
Makes 6 servings.
